description: Phase-start autosave: at the start of each phase the controlling player writes/overwrites a save named '<army1> vs <army2> - <phase>'. On by default with a Settings > Gameplay toggle. This drives real PhaseManager transitions (the same signal a player's End Phase triggers) and asserts the named save appears when ON, does NOT appear when the toggle is OFF, and reappears when turned back ON.

steps.script:
var n = "%s vs %s - Movement" % [GameState.get_faction_name(1), GameState.get_faction_name(2)]
SaveLoadManager.delete_save_file(n)
PhaseManager.transition_to_phase(7)
return true

var n = "%s vs %s - Movement" % [GameState.get_faction_name(1), GameState.get_faction_name(2)]
return SaveLoadManager.save_exists(n)

SettingsService.set_autosave_on_phase_start(false)
var n = "%s vs %s - Command" % [GameState.get_faction_name(1), GameState.get_faction_name(2)]
SaveLoadManager.delete_save_file(n)
PhaseManager.transition_to_phase(6)
return SaveLoadManager.autosave_on_phase_start

var n = "%s vs %s - Command" % [GameState.get_faction_name(1), GameState.get_faction_name(2)]
return SaveLoadManager.save_exists(n)

SettingsService.set_autosave_on_phase_start(true)
var n = "%s vs %s - Movement" % [GameState.get_faction_name(1), GameState.get_faction_name(2)]
SaveLoadManager.delete_save_file(n)
PhaseManager.transition_to_phase(7)
return true

var n = "%s vs %s - Movement" % [GameState.get_faction_name(1), GameState.get_faction_name(2)]
return SaveLoadManager.save_exists(n)
